scripts.predev: npm run build:eliza -w @background-agents/sdk && npm run prisma:generate
scripts.dev:test: dotenv -e packages/web/.env.test -e packages/web/.env -e .env -c -- npm run dev -w @background-agents/web
scripts.predev:electron: npm run build:eliza -w @background-agents/sdk && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build -w @background-agents/electron
scripts.dev:electron: dotenv -e packages/electron/.env -e packages/web/.env -e .env -c -- sh -c 'npm run dev -w @background-agents/web & sleep 3 && electron packages/electron/dist/main.js'
scripts.prisma:migrate: dotenv -e packages/web/.env -e .env -c -- sh -c 'cd packages/web && npx prisma migrate dev'
scripts.prisma:migrate:deploy: dotenv -e packages/web/.env -e .env -c -- sh -c 'cd packages/web && npx prisma migrate deploy'
scripts.prisma:generate: dotenv -e packages/web/.env -e .env -c -- sh -c 'cd packages/web && npx prisma generate'
scripts.prisma:status: dotenv -e packages/web/.env -e .env -c -- sh -c 'cd packages/web && npx prisma migrate status'
scripts.build: dotenv -e packages/web/.env -e .env -c -- sh -c 'npm run build -w @background-agents/sdk && npm run build -w @background-agents/web'
scripts.build:web: dotenv -e packages/web/.env -e .env -c -- sh -c 'npm run build -w @background-agents/sdk && npm run prisma:generate && npm run build -w @background-agents/web'
scripts.start:electron: dotenv -e packages/electron/.env -e packages/web/.env -e .env -c -- sh -c 'BACKGROUND_AGENTS_URL="${BACKGROUND_AGENTS_URL:-https://backgrounder.dev}" npm run start -w @background-agents/electron'
